summary: Comprehensive testing of Map Management features completed successfully. All core functionality (floor CRUD, zone drawing/editing/deletion, crowd density controls) working correctly. Backend 14/14 tests pass, Frontend UI fully functional.

issues: Test floor 'طابق اختباري' has broken image (placeholder URL 'https://via.placeholder.com/800x600' not loading)

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/login - Admin login with admin@crowd.sa works correctly
Backend: GET /api/floors - Returns floor list (found 2 floors including Basement)
Backend: POST /api/admin/floors - Create new floor works (returns floor with id)
Backend: GET /api/floors/{id} - Get single floor by id works
Backend: PUT /api/admin/floors/{id} - Update floor name/order works
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/floors/{id} - Delete floor works (returns 404 after delete)
Backend: GET /api/zones - Returns all zones list
Backend: POST /api/admin/zones - Create zone with polygon_points works
Backend: GET /api/floors/{floor_id}/zones - Get zones for specific floor works
Backend: PUT /api/admin/zones/{id} - Update zone polygon and crowd works
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/zones/{id} - Delete zone works (returns 404 after delete)
Backend: GET /api/zones/stats/summary - Returns stats with total_zones, overall_percentage, by_status
Backend: POST /api/admin/upload/map-image - Image upload returns URL
Frontend: Login with admin@crowd.sa / admin123 successful
Frontend: Map Management page (/map-management) loads correctly
Frontend: Floors Tab shows floor cards with images, view/edit/delete buttons
Frontend: Add Floor dialog opens with fields (name_ar, name_en, floor_number, order, image dropzone)
Frontend: Image drag-and-drop zone present in Add Floor dialog
Frontend: Delete floor confirmation dialog shows with cancel/delete buttons
Frontend: Zones Tab shows floor selector, mode buttons (pan/draw/edit), zoom controls
Frontend: Map editor displays floor plan image with SVG overlay
Frontend: Draw mode shows crosshair cursor and instruction banner
Frontend: Edit mode shows zone selection with blue drag handles at corners
Frontend: Delete zone button appears when zone is selected in edit mode
Frontend: Zone list at bottom shows zones with color indicator and delete button
Frontend: Crowd Tab shows floor selector, stats cards, save button
Frontend: Zone card in Crowd tab shows current/max capacity, slider, +/- buttons, preset buttons
Frontend: Status badge (طبيعي/متوسط/مزدحم) displayed correctly
Frontend: Changing crowd value enables save button
action_items: MINOR: Clean up test floor 'طابق اختباري' with broken placeholder image or update its image URL
seed_data_creation: Created zone MATAF-01 for testing (id: eecb6186-504b-427d-9a2b-05e6c2ddb88b)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Map Management feature fully tested. All CRUD operations for floors and zones work. Zone drawing, editing (drag handles), and deletion functional. Crowd density controls (slider, input, preset buttons) work correctly. Test zone MATAF-01 created on Basement floor. Test floor 'طابق اختباري' has broken image.

feature_verification.zones_list: PASS - Shows zones with color and delete button
feature_verification.crowd_stats: PASS - Total zones, crowd, occupancy displayed
